title: At the Post Office 邮局寄信
scene: 在邮局寄明信片或包裹。

lines.en: Excuse me, I would like to send this postcard to my friend in Beijing.
lines.zh: 打扰一下，我想把这封明信片寄给北京的朋友。

lines.en: Sure. Let me weigh it for you. A postcard to Beijing is two yuan.
lines.zh: 好的。我帮您称一下。寄到北京的明信片是两元。

lines.en: That is cheap. How long will it take to arrive?
Usually about three to five days by regular mail.
lines.zh: 平信的话通常是三到五天。

lines.en: I also have a small package. How much is the shipping?
lines.zh: 我还有一个小包裹。运费是多少？

lines.en: Where is the package going? Let me put it on the scale.
lines.zh: 包裹要寄到哪里？我放在秤上称一下。

lines.en: It is going to Shanghai. It is a birthday gift for my cousin.
lines.zh: 寄到上海。是给我表哥的生日礼物。

lines.en: That will be twelve yuan by express. It will arrive in two days.
lines.zh: 快递的话是十二元。两天就能到。

lines.en: Express please. Here is the money. Thank you for your help!
lines.zh: 那就寄快递吧。给你钱。谢谢你的帮助！
